segments.text: It was very nice to come to Reading again
and meet people like your Mayor
another person who was interviewing Me at the radio station.
I'm discovering new talents in this place
which is really historically important,
but In the history of spirituality
England as a whole has to play
very,very important role
which perhaps English people don't realize.
William Blake had said that
That England have become Jerusalem
it's has became holy land
and you all are becoming holy people
He is not liar
he won tell lie
People can say
was visionary
And visualized things
beyond his foresight
That's not a fact because about Sahaja Yoga he has written very vividly, clearly as to
where I'll be staying since my arrival in England.
Where our ashram is going tp?
It so beautifully done that i feel this land have something special about it
produce or to create such great poets, such great seers.
India of course is a country of yoga no doubt but there also we had
the great poet about same time as Blake may be little earlier Gyaneshwara
he did write about Kundalini
He has described times of Sahaja Yoga by saying that at
darkness, the people who are blind will see light.
He's also gone further to say that those
People Who Will Receive Light
We'll Be Able To Enlighten Other People
But William Blake has very clearly said
That Men of God
Will Become Prophets
And These Prophets
will have powers to make others prophets.
And this is the test that you should put through everything,
how I become a prophet?
It's all right there are many people who're around
or selling their things
–I don't know what they do to attract more people.
Like… The mayor asked Me
as your work was so fantastic
and must be serving thousands of people
I said, no.
I don't!
Sometimes i receive five or sometimes ten.
He was amazed he said how can that be as it is true
and received very few people to come into my program
And if they came
and stick on for a while
with realization all right
but there are many who have come
It must quite amaze
Is it really?
But im surprised
you dont charge any money
There's not membership
I mean its really shows
That something divine
And still, how is it few people come to you?
I said that I will ask the same question
because i don't understand you only.
You better ask for me
why so many people come and take advantage of this Sahaja Yoga
which gives your power
That's lying within yourself
Which give what
have already existing in you
It has its own property
They don't come, even if you tell them freely
You are going to be given all your bank balances.
Please calm please calm but they do not come
So I said instead of asking Me this question for the first time let me ask you
This is a different thing in Indian villages where people come in thousands
One other reason may that people do know much about Kundalini
They are naive about that and they do not know what it means by the word self-realization.
What is a Self?
And why should It happen to us, perhaps That may be one of the reasons for ignorance
about it but despite all this, this word self realization has been used since long
by many marketeers and nobody has been able to give it.
Now, if somebody says yes can happen
just let happened I think there should be real interest
but still i cannot explain why
Why is that few people come
And those who came also do not stick on
They have no patience
But with other gurus
He asked me I said No they are very good
Thousands and thousands. There's one fellow whom the British people have given 58 Rolls-Royce
And then they gave him a 59th one because he wouldn't come without getting a Rolls Royce from them
So, They starved themselves for 1 year
I've give Him that 59th Rolls-Royce
How many people must of done it? 50 thousand people collected their money
To give it to this fellow, to come down here already now he has 59th I think you must be
waiting for the 16.
Now won't we surprised that they will again collecting money from him?
One must understand what you cannot pay for God – You can not buy God by giving
Him Rolls Royce He doesn' t understands Rolls Royce, He does nt understand Money
,He dosn''t understand Bank . He ….. He…..
this paper money. He is not aware of these things, but somehow we are so much used to
these mundane thing and irregular thinks that personally all us feel if it's going
be God he has just like there should an organization ,there a chairman or vice-chairman
there has to be a sacred free and all this organization must
have been there. And they're only if you go then it's
alright, we are safe because we are used
but God's laws
in God's domain is very different from what
We've never felt Islam
You'll always working all over organized
Because we were insecure about every
institution for some kind of an insecurity
Because we are insecure, something is going to fall upon us.
Horrible thing's gonna happen – that how they form a thing
otherwise our children may be spoiled or
Our old people might die
Or somehting will happened and we formed an organization
This not believing in God
Secondly
We found also organizations because we hate
But have never seen the power of love
which is the most beautiful, blissful and smoothly working
like a flower becoming fruit.
Have you ever seen a flower becomeing fruit?
Nobody has see it how slowly it becomes!
You have to put slow motion camera
To catch that slow movement
All this done by this great power of God
this Divine Power, which is called as Brahma in Sanskrit language.
And to know that Brahma
Is the idea behind Self-realization
It's all pervading it works everywhere
but we cannot feel and have To Feel That
How do you feel?
how Do You Know That
The only way is to get yourself connected with your self
Which connects you to that all pervading power
and it starts flowing through you.
If we learn the ways and methods,
You can maneuver It,
We Can use It
And give to others also
Its a very simple thing like putting a connection
Like
When come in room
if have put on lights
just switch ON
its like that
Very Simple
But when we switch on light
must know there is a very huge
organization behind this little switch
In same way
Behind all this there's a very great organization of God Almighty,
which we have not known. We've just heard about God!
There is god and let us pray to God... All that.
Where Is He? What Is he?
And what are WE?
You never know that so first time you get connected with His power
Now how about Spirit?
I mean in English language spirit is used for many things
they will use it as dead body
It's the Spirit. We'll use it for also spirits, alcohols,
spirit of Atma but where I'm talking
now is about the atma –
The Spirit which is a reflection
God Almighty within us
Which watches every moment
Every action
And it stays there till it enjoys
To understand this Spirit
we have to know its nature
What does the nature of this Spirit is
And then when we get enlightenment, what happens to us?
Now here you have seen three powers as they've shown.
The first power is on the right-hand side
– it's a Power of Action and
I mean that First one
Is the Power Of Desire which
Which in left hand side
Second One
It' s A Power Of Action
In the center
Is the Power
What We call the Sustainance
That gives You our evolution
So there are Three Powers
These three powers act within us.
For example, the first power of desire
The First Power Of Desire Within Us
acts in such a manner that we start desiring for things
Actually
whole universe is created
out to the Universe this beautiful thing like human being is created
and This
Power That Has Created This Special Thing Called Human Being
Is the Residual Power
that resides in the triangular bone
for ultimate desire to be one with the Divine.
But it has not yet manifested,
so thats why its called as a residual power
It hasn't yet manifested
because we have become one
With The Divine
So this Power is still sleeping within us
That's Why they call it as sleeping Kundalini
but that Desire is within Us
and that drives all kinds of seeking
We make mistakes, we do all kinds of wrong choices.
Doesn't matter! Everything can be forgiven
but she decides in the triangular bone
waiting for a chance when
She could be awakened by somebody who has authority to awaken
as He told you just now that it's an actualization
You cannot go into church and someone puts their hand on your head
And says alright I have baptized you
This is only false certificate
You know that, it's a false certificate.
But when this power is manifested
then you become one with the Divine
When yoga – The union takes place
Then only we can say that Kundalini has manifested itself
Means your desire to be one
With the divine has been manifested
So now there are four powers I have told about
One Is Power of Desire
with which we desire other things,
like you may desire to have a chair.
So what do if there is some steel
that's dead and then make another stuff called
the chair of steel and it's dead?
We sit on this and start becoming habituated
means part or us are dead
because they can't be without chairs
The chair sits in our head
people carry chairs for them
because they just can't sit without the chairs.
Like that,
The matter starts fighting your spirit
and start giving you habits
Another thing of Matter is
it never gives joy
For example if want to have a table
alright then we wanna have chair
Then Iwanttohavea car
ThanIwannothaveahelicopter
Andneverhappen
So wants in general are never satiable
Is the principle
Of economics
Why? Because
Matter cannot give you satisfaction
That's why it just plays with you. You like one thing,
jump to another and so on...
Now this matter within us is created by the right side
that comes from five elements
And these 5 elements when they are not enlightened
do no give joy
They're within ourselves
We use them we think
by supposing somebody thinks that if I go to race and
If i win a big amount of money,I'll be happy.
But you see the person after six months
You will find he is most unhappy person ever
No! Because Money Is A headache
House Is A headache
Anything That Your Own It's a headache
it better
other should own And enjoy
Thats The Better Way Of Looking At Things
but
we think that possession
something that
We can really Enjoy
which is not true because we are not going to take anything with us.
Now when these five elements act upon Us,
what happens? What do We develop in the subtle way?
Attention! Say there's something a matter here
My attention can be drawn through it
If There Is Something Material
my attention Can Be Drawn Through It
But supposing that something is in the ether I cannot see
something that is not material, I cannot see it.
So the attention can't be drawn
That's how our attention
Is created by these five elements within ourselves
Now this attention we have
naturally because It was created
By the material things
in a sense of It has been created
By the causal
Causal
Of all These elements
Our Attention goes to material things
Naturally
Because It Was created
By them
Our attention is outside. If I say, put your attention inside how can you?
There's no way of putting it in side –
It' s an impossible situation
because anything that happens
our attention goes there
something material, something substantial we see
and then our attentions go to That
but How Can You Put Your Attention Inside
Because We Are Lost
We Don't Know Where To Go
How To Find Him
So this attention is within us
And when the Kundalini rises, then the attention is drawn in because of The Happening.
That's why a happening necessary.
Supposing suddenly you are listening to Me and something falls down
your Attention will go through it?
Thats'why a happening takes place that this Kundalini rises
as she attracts the Attention inside.
But actually When She touches the Spirit
what happens To the Attention itself?
Attention becomes enlightened
Now what is that?
Attention becomes enlightened means, what?
Means this attention has a light.
Now supposing you have an attention which as the light
What should happen
That if we look at anyone
You will be able to know
The person in and out
This would first thing isn't it
If your attention had like
We could see through
That persons just like x-ray
Should go with problem
Then
If your attention is enlightened, you should be able to help that person also with
Your attention. By saying enlightenment means it's the
Enlightenment by The Divine Power of Love
So if You pay Attention To somebody
That love must act otherwise which Is just like any other Attention
This we Pay Attention to this nothing happens
You pay Attention too that Nothing happens
You pay Attention Too anyone nothing happens
But when you are enlightened then
your attention is enlightened and you will find after Sahaja Yoga, if you pay attention
to someone we can cure that person. If have reached a certain stage I should say maturity
in sahajyoga like there was one of the first sahaja yogis who got his realization
he's here i think uh..he was little doubtful and said mother our attention gets enlightened
How are we to know about other people?" I said, very easy.
About whom do you want? He says,"I wanna know my father."
All right his Father was in Scotland. You put your hands
and think of Your Father! Just Think!
It started a burning here
Now these the centers for Your Father
These are the centers For Mother
And this started Burning
This finger denotes this center
So i told him he must be down with very bad bronchitis
He said, how can there be telecommunication?
This is enlightenment into new world of telecommunications.
I say all right you ring up your father
he rang his father and the Father never came to home
And His mother says
Your father Is down with very bad bronchitis
Now sitting Down here You Can give cure To that
now it's not a cock-and-bull story
It is so fantastic that people can't believe it, but you have to have certain maturity
do.
If your light a little hazy then doesn' t work out I mean sitting down here in London
i should say most humbly and some other ppl have done also.
So what happens if the attention which goes there for example now our attention
is dead in a way, this goes there what happens? Only thoughts start coming to us. On the contrary
it's more dominating than ourselves because as soon I look at something some thought starts
coming up and you can't even get anything without some thoughts come into your head
imagine that domination of matter on earth everything gives out while when we look
to think when you are a realized soul, then this attention acts. If it is the living thing
You can see that action working out but if It Is dead than what happens? Then you become
thoughtless say up! You'll se a beautiful painting See A Beautiful Painting Now there
is no thought in your mind so all The creation of That Painting just starts pouring
you as joy. You feel that joy just pouring into it because there is no thought in between,
otherwise normally we'll think who has painted this picture? Who have done these? How much
they must've paid? That's first thing! First question would be how much money
was there of course and second will the artist all his questions actually paralyze
the art, the creation – like a wave-free surface of some lake.
You can see that complete image
—the reflection—of these surroundings of that lake
The Complete Creation
and the Complete Joy comes to us
in same way you become absolutely thoughtless
See something
And then becomes absolutely thoughtless
Because joy is so complete
that just gets turned and the whole thing starts pouring into you, like showers of joy.
Is an experience which we cannot have before Realization
It's only possible after Realization
That You can enjoy your attention
And it is such a joker
Your attention plays tricks
Tells to so many things about other people
Like I was coming
And I said, now let's see this gentleman.
Have to meet him at least his vibrations
and say Now! His vibrations is sketchy all right
What does that mean? Problem with his wife
Either he has a no-wife or if she as the wife
it' s wrong relationship
Maybe there was problem in her life
When we discovered It was so what
Because i knew about it
I didn't touch That point
You know If you Say that
We'll have it
Better not say that point
you know already about the gentleman, what sort of a problem he has.
So better not touch that point and gradually try to remove it."
Like this! It is so easy after realization
To now about others
like a gentlemen came see Me
He was an Indian
And knew
That person who's a seeker
Is supposed drink when come at least as holy persons
But here gave up his drinking
For eight days didn't drink
He had a bath, everything and nice mouthwash with
every thing. And he came an saw Me
I said you have to give up your alcohol cup
He says Mother how do we do this?
As soon as i know because of the centers that are catching in him
Are only possible if You're drunkard
An'I say You've been drunken
That's why it has been there
He agreed
But 8 days back
I gave It up
I said eight day makes no difference
I know that you have been a drunkard and will have to give up that gradually."
He said, "'I'll be it Mother. I promise You.'
But this really surprised him how did i know about her?
So much so
That once the lady came see me
And uh..i found
Her right hand here
Was completely charred
An' This was all catchy
So I asked her what is your relationship with your father
Specially in his finger
Oh! She says what has to do over there
Normally, girls in India are very attached to their fathers and it's a very good relationship.
I said there must be something wrong otherwise you can't get such horrible feelings about
this but how do You know Mother?
And she went away!
Just after that her mother came here
And her father, so that was our daughter who had come to see you.
I said really?
He says do You know this girl has filed a suit against Me, my Father
Really!
and on wrong basis under the advice of very long person
Her husband is abroad
some wrong persons put ideas into head
So she has filed a suit
The attention gives all information when it's enlightened
It corrects the problems
and of all the things it warns you, it warns before hand.
For a Sahaja Yogi supposing a sahaj yogi is mislead he loses his way
then its accepted that we have to go there
And just goes in this direction
He finds something which has lost for long time
or meets friend whom had meet

We don't mind getting lose, getting lossed
anything because
You find
That this was necessary
to go that way, to find. It's so interesting and so interwoven
And sometimes you start understanding after some time
That there are angels who're looking after us
Definitely they'are the angels who guide
Every moment we take our attention
To things which are involved
Because of Spirit quality
To be collectively conscious
Our attention itself becomes collective
The priorities change
The priorities changed so much, like I was going in Kashmir one day
In a car and suddenly I told my husband that there is the tremendous vibrations at this place
So he asked driver. He said,"Is any temple here?"
They said no it's some wilderness
There are no temples nothing. I said about two three miles maybe let us go ahead
So he said, you know there's some Muslims staying here and see there is no temple.
No question of having a Temple."
I say,"Is that a mosque?"
Oh! He says yes.
There it the Mosque of Hazarat Bal.
One hair off Mohammed Sahab
Is kept in That Mosque
And
i felt the vibrations at least four or five miles away from me
When we came out three miles
I could just tell him how to go
Only one hair was emitting vibrations
so The whole priority
the attention goes to things which has good divine vibrations.
It is not bothered about thing,s
that have no good vibrations
whatever as good vibration it will go through them
like a person who's holy person
he touches anything and it vibrates
you touch water ,it vibrates
Anything You Touch
Anything You Feel
it vibrates
for example
Water if you vibrate
can be a medicine
River Ganges is nothing but vibrated water
You get vibrations from that.
These vibrations are divine vibrations,
or the vibrations of The Power Of Love
– it is something so much out-of–the blue
but suddenly if you hear about these things
It sounds quite odd and fantastic
But this not odd to Indians they know all about
This knowledge has come us
In the Bible Christ said
That your hands will speak
Your Hands Will Speak
That means in your hands you'll be feeling it.
He said very clearly,
Your Hands will speak that's what should happen to us
–that our hands

To Us
What They have to Communicate
Because all the centers are represented
In Our Hand
As shown there
You can see
All The Centers
Are on left hand side and right-hand Side
We Can See Very Clearly

On Our Hand

If know if you know the decoding of It
You can immediately say what the other person is suffering from,
What you are suffering.
And then we have to learn how
To correct those problems of that another person
So first thing happens
That your attention becomes enlightened
This attention it's so wonderful
It' s joy giving
Its humorous
Because u become like a witness
The whole things became joke
You see seriously people running up and down
you know, to do something and you just don't understand.
And then You ask them what's the matter?
Oh! We don' tknow it is very important
Very important. Yes What?
I put all My money for a race
All right

head hung
What happened?
l lost my money
The way He was running
,the way His coming down
It s big joke
But To Him it s not that He becomes serious
Sometimes He become involved into it
sometimes He let in
but You are enjoying the whole joke
The whole tragedy and comedy of life you enjoy like a spectator.
You become the spectator,
your no more worried upset or in tension
Actually I've seen people who are very hot tempered
becomes so placid
And sweet
So poised
It's surprising how they change
because there have got balancing point
absolute point

when we get realization
But then what happenes with awareness
which you get from the central path of your evolution.
For example, animals have an awareness also we
Have an awareness much higher than that
Of animals some people say yes
We can play tennis You see

But one awareness human beings
Definitely whatever they may be
At what ever level
that they understand what is dirty,
What Is filthy. They can span it.
Animals Can't!
You take a horse or dog through the Dirty lane
It will just walk like
as if its leading a parade for The Queen you see
It has no problems
But For human beings we have to put something
To cover our nose
So Like That
We Have Many Other Things

We have sense of color, we are a sense of beauty.
You're a sense or balance?

haves horses will not have dolphins
they don't have there so close to us
They live with them but
But now what happens
To human awareness at this stage is
That this human awareness suddenly jumps up into
A new dimension that you become collectively
You've become again as it's an actualization
It happens during
awareness. You just become collectively conscious, means little children – today Olympia I see
she was interviewing Me and She came put Her fingers in her ears because the lady who
is talking to me had a problem with Her throat perhaps maybe She has used Her throat

The little one – she's very small about two years away
She just put it but still you say I…
…she felt that He has not helped me fully so
So she puts her both of Her fingers in the mouth to suggest
That please look after a lady who got this problem
The concern and feeling
..that get for another person
Is so tremendous
...so tremendous
....that people can't understand
But its' very simple
Because if you become part and parcel of the person,
how can You not have concern?
When who is other.
The problem means now supposing
that sitting before Me
I know a problem in your stomach
–I'll also be having little problems
And so concerned about this problem
That it's my stomach as though
This problem exists
It just like there
The awareness becomes
So collectively conscious
That he comes part and parcel
Who are others
Feeling of otherness goes away
Now people talk big things like,
we are all united. We're brothers and sisters
You must avoid these speeches
And when it comes to wars they'll fight
But in this you cannot fight
Because who is the other?
Can't fight your nose
can' t fight with hand
or fingers
Nor do help anyone
You don''t have any one
because supposing that finger's in trouble
This hand presses it
Does It Help Me?
Nothing
Neither Obliged nor Helping
This Is One
That feeling of Oneness
that you are part and parcel of the whole, is established.
Because of this feeling
– it's such a tremendous thing
to be part-and-parceled with the Whole
then one gets cured
The curing comes because
from an innate understanding
by your being
You're not alone
You've been part or parcel of the whole
You have been a cell
of God's whole body
God or you are a microcosm of the macrocosms.
This is not just psychological
and rational thing, but it's become
You can't help
And when we are that
We don´t feel helping anyone
It's like one cell acting for another cell
The whole works in such homogeneous way
No fighting no quarreling
On contrary enjoy each other
You just love each other and you just see the good points of another person.
We don't need bad point, we forget all creeds
because a nose doesn´t say I am higher than hands
or feet do not say that they are lower then their hand
They all require supposing there is something wrong with your feet
Just try to help
Something wrong in the nose will help
Your nose
You dont discriminate in body
In same way
We do not discriminate.

You are from India or from Asia
Or any other place
From England America
Anyplace
Maybe
May be Chinese
Every sort of faces we have
In the cross section
Of Sahaja Yogis
Will find all kinds
People out there

Must see
The way when these people
From england went to india
To villages where I work
Villagers just grabbed
They were so happy
They said, first time we are meeting our brothers and sisters.
And these people were just enjoying them
they all started dancing of course
–they're very light-footed
–They wanted to dance with those people
I know the Britishers aren't so light footed
So found it rather difficult
They made him jump! Jump! Jump!
Now there have become good dancers too
All danced together and sing
in complete joy and understanding
See this whole attitude towards life changes
You've really become a princess
In the sense that you don't need anything, there is no dearth.
If There Is A Dearth Then You Are A Beggar
if There Is No Dearth We Can Sleep Here
we can sleep in a palace
and if want to get a Rolls Royce or
what's the difference?
Because The Joy Comes From Your Spirit
not from outside thing
whole idea of comfort changes
Whole Idea Of Luxury Changes
It's all completely changed because you enter into this new dimension
and that is what happens to your awareness
–that,you become collective.
The enlightenment gives a human awareness
of the New Dimension by which we are connected
Now emotion give us happiness
You see if love somebody who feel happy
when meet with person will be very happy
And you want to bestow all our love on them
If children there
they would like to love
them and give love. But before realization, this joy is limited! For example husband-wife
relation I can understand but what children like in India you see they love their children
so much that will even sell the country for it's childrens' sake . The love becomes
a position ,it becomea Love-Hate relationship You See? They love So Much That They Come
To Hate. It Is A Funny Thing But It Happens. Why ? Because It Has Limitations. Love
has limitations. It's not infinite, but when you get your love enlightened
there is joy! There are no material give and take
plus enjoy each other
In Calcutta first time on my way to America I was staying in a hotel
where five or six Sahaja Yogis stayed with me
And one gentleman came
To see Me
He fell at My feet
Tremendous vibrations here
They all rushed
I said, Why? Tremendous joy started flowing over our head Mother. Who is at your feet?
They all rushed to Me!
He said see this one. Ha ha they all stood.
Ah what enjoyment, he was enjoying and there were enjoying him
This the first time you enjoy human beings
because You can feel the vibrations of a person
What beauty human being is
What a glory he is, what blessing He has,
but the creation you realize only after realization.
Before that You judge him
Oh!
…He's got long hair
and He' s got red hair
And He've got long nose
all this
But then just see Him in subtle way
–what He Is
His vibration

If they get somebody
They'll rush there
The fellow who was there
are taking vibrations
For half an hour I am tired now, I said no finish it off but they are just sucking like
a child.
First time you enjoy human beings the joy which has not duality.
Joy does have happiness and unhappiness.
Happiness comes to us when our ego is pampered unhappy comes to us when our ego is dampened
It's something different we aren't our egos We're ourselves
And when self enjoys something, it enjoys.
There is no remorse there's no duality about
–there' sno unhappiness so joy
Is a complete thing
It cannot be described
Its just to experience and enjoy within ourselves
That what happens with us
When we get our realization
Our idea of love changes
Like you say oh I loved this person
Like your husband is there, all right.
You have to love him like a husband
you don't everybody like husband – alright?
Your sister's here
and the lover likes her sister
but think of others as sisters
then you love them
thinking they are brothers
If we love everyone
Love spreads
It does not rest in one place
it doesn´t stagnate
or co-ordinate
Supposing, in a plant the sap is rising
and it goes to one flower because It loves it
And settles down there. The tree will die
&the Flower Will Die
So love we have before realization
Is like that Love which dies ultimately
or creates problems
But love after realization
Is a love that emits despise
